category_sources: Official mandoc.bsd.lv page describes mandoc as a suite for compiling mdoc and man manuals.
source_facts.description says mandoc is a UNIX manpage compiler toolset.
display_name_sources: Official mandoc.bsd.lv project page uses the display name mandoc.
docs_sources: Official mandoc.bsd.lv provides manual pages including mandoc(1).
source_facts.homepage is the official mandoc project and documentation index.
repo_sources: Official mandoc anonymous CVS page documents public access to the mandoc source code repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, and the official mandoc.bsd.lv site links to its CVS web interface as the source repository browser.
tags_sources: Official mandoc.bsd.lv page describes support for mdoc, man, roff, terminal, HTML, PostScript, and PDF output.
source_facts.description identifies a UNIX manpage compiler toolset.
